intended_role: Compliance officer for a regulated financial services firm
natural_advantage: Protects the organization by making risk visible before it becomes expensive.
natural_risk: Can become the bottleneck when business teams need faster risk-tiered guidance.
energy_source: Clear standards, audit trails, and preventing avoidable exposure.
fatigue_source: Pressure to approve exceptions without evidence.
best_environment: Regulated setting where compliance has authority and business partnership.
worst_environment: Growth culture that treats controls as a late-stage obstacle.
initial_role_fit_judgment: Strong compliance fit; best when policy guidance is tiered by risk severity.
scoring_notes: Top dimensions fidelity, framework, vector broadly match intended role signal; bottom dimensions velocity, leverage create plausible fatigue/risk.

role_fit_analysis.builder_vs_optimizer: Hybrid - Can build or optimize depending on context
role_fit_analysis.explorer_vs_stabilizer: Pragmatic - Explores when needed, stabilizes when required
role_fit_analysis.ambiguity_tolerance: Moderate - Can handle ambiguity with boundaries
natural_roles: Needs dimension refinement for specific role fit

requires: Direct communication culture, tolerance for bluntness

one_move.title: The One Move
one_move.the_move: Reduce load through structure, not faster thinking
one_move.reasoning: Energy depletion indicated. Load reduction more sustainable than speed.
one_move.timeline: 90 days to shift trajectory. 6-9 months for full organizational shift.
one_move.caution: Not advice. Highest-leverage intervention based on evidence.

futures.title: Precision Authority
futures.trajectory: Detail mastery deepens. Operator becomes quality gate. Org optimizes to this standard.
futures.organization_experiences: Organization becomes known for quality. But process becomes slower.

futures.title: fidelity Amplified
futures.trajectory: Strength fully deployed. fidelity becomes organizational competitive advantage.
futures.organization_experiences: Organization becomes advantage carrier. fidelity strength compounds into competitive edge.

futures.title: Detail Overwhelm
futures.trajectory: Fidelity applied to everything. Organization drowns in specs, processes, reviews. Velocity collapses.
futures.organization_experiences: Operator strength becomes organizational weakness. System breaks under pressure.

futures.title: Quality Standards Resentment
futures.trajectory: Fidelity expectations become unreasonable. Team feels constantly judged. Talent leaves. Morale drops.
futures.organization_experiences: Team fractionalizes. Information stops flowing. Organization loses resilience. Key talent leaves.

futures.title: Sustainable Pace
futures.trajectory: Workload restructured. Operator energy stabilized. Decision quality improves. Team feels supported, not overwhelmed.
futures.organization_experiences: Organization becomes sustainable. Operator + team capability both high. Scalable structure emerges. Growth accelerates.

five_futures.summary: Five trajectory scenarios emerge from your current operating pattern.

most_likely.title: Precision Authority
most_likely.trajectory: Detail mastery deepens. Operator becomes quality gate. Org optimizes to this standard.
most_likely.organization_experiences: Organization becomes known for quality. But process becomes slower.

facilitator_notes.title: Facilitator Notes
facilitator_notes.caution: Environment design notes, not behavior coaching. Operator function is fixed; organization design is flexible.
